hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); TP=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".transcript_path // \"\""); if [ -n "$TP" ]; then HASH=$(echo -n "$TP" | md5sum | cut -c1-8); LOG="tdd-${HASH}.log"; else LOG="tdd.log"; fi; mkdir -p .claude/learnings && PREFIX=$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M) && jq -n --arg msg "COMPACTION INCOMING -- Reflect on this session. Create .claude/learnings/${PREFIX}-{slug}.md (kebab-case topic slug). Include: 1) Surprises about the codebase 2) Key learnings for future sessions 3) Hook/workflow recommendations 4) Skill recommendations. Also review your TDD log at $LOG for inappropriate overrides or skip-red usage (eg. for behavioral changes), or BLOCKED edits. Keep it concise." "{systemMessage:\$msg}"'

bash -c 'cmd=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if [[ "$cmd" =~ ^(npm run test|npm test).*(\||;|>) ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Test commands must not be piped, chained, or redirected. Run the full command without | grep, | tail, > file, etc. to see complete test output." >&2; exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'cmd=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if [[ "$cmd" =~ ^python ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: python must be run via uv." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'cmd=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if [[ "$cmd" =~ python3?\ -m\ py_compile ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: python syntax is already automatically checked on every edit." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'cmd=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if [[ "$cmd" =~ ^timeout ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: shell timeout usage prevents commands matching against allowlist entries, forcing the user to unnecessarily grant permissions." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'cmd=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.command); if [[ $cmd =~ ^supabase\ .*--linked ]] || [[ $cmd =~ ^supabase\ (db\ push|db\ remote|functions\ deploy|functions\ delete|secrets\ set|secrets\ unset|storage\ rm|projects\ delete|branches\ delete|link\ |unlink) ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Supabase commands that modify production are not allowed. Deployment is the user responsibility." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); if [ "$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".stop_hook_active // false")" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; TP=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".transcript_path // \"\""); if [ -n "$TP" ]; then HASH=$(echo -n "$TP" | md5sum | cut -c1-8); LOG="tdd-${HASH}.log"; else LOG="tdd.log"; fi; jq -n --arg reason "SESSION ENDING -- If you learned anything noteworthy, create .claude/learnings/$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M)-{slug}.md (kebab-case topic). Include surprises, key learnings, hook/workflow recommendations, skill recommendations. Also review your TDD log at $LOG for inappropriate overrides or skip-red usage (eg. for behavioral changes), or BLOCKED edits. Skip if nothing noteworthy." "{decision:\"block\",reason:\$reason}"'
